edit.cta-not-allowed: You're not allowed to edit this playbook

us-residents.enabled: U.S. residents are allowed to be onboarded
us-residents.disabled: U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded

us-residents.empty: U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded

non-us-residents.title: Non-U.S. residents

non-us-residents.enabled: Non-U.S. residents are allowed to be onboarded
non-us-residents.disabled: Non-U.S. residents are not allowed to be onboarded

us-territories.label: Note:
us-territories.content: Residents from U.S. territories are allowed to be onboarded

data-collection.id-doc-first: Document scan will be used to autofill basic identity data

investor_profile.title: Investor profile questions
investor_profile.enabled: Investor profiling questions will be part of the onboarding process
investor_profile.disabled: Investor profiling questions will not be part of the onboarding process

global.title: Globally accepted government-issued ID
global.empty: No globally accepted doc scans configured

country-specific.title: Country-based accepted government-issued ID
country-specific.none: No country specific accepted doc scans configured

additional-docs.title: Additional docs
additional-docs.empty: No additional docs docs are available for scanning

poa.title: Proof of Address
poa.description: Official documents displaying the user's address

possn.title: Proof of SSN
possn.description: Scan of Social Security card or official document displaying your name and Social Security Number

additional-docs.requires-manual-review: After upload, user will be marked for manual review

enable.label: Enable passkey registration
enable.hint: We use passkeys to validate your users’ identity without the need for a password

allow-reonboard.title: Allow reonboarding
allow-reonboard.description: If the user has already onboarded onto this playbook, allow them to onboard again. Please note repeat onboardings incur normal charges. You are responsible for all charges incurred from repeat users onboarding onto your platform multiple times

skip-confirm.title: Skip confirmation screen
skip-confirm.description: When enabled, users will not see the confirmation screen during the onboarding flow

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Define the onboarding logic for your playbook
rules.empty-rules: This playbook does not have rules
rules.cta-not-allowed: You're not allowed to edit rules
rules.kyb-alert: These rules apply to Business Owners and Businesses

edit-bar.tooltip: Changes will only take effect if you click "Save changes"

fail.title: Fail
fail.subtitle: User will be marked as failed

manual-review.title: Fail + Manual review
manual-review.subtitle: User will be marked as failed and flagged for review

step-up.title: Step-up
step-up.subtitle: User will be asked to scan or upload another document
step-up.step-up-identity-proof-of-ssn: Identity document and Proof of SSN

pass-with-manual-review.title: Pass + Manual review
pass-with-manual-review.subtitle: User will be onboarded, but should be manually reviewed

action-row.add-list-tooltip: First create a list to add a list condition

field.empty: There is no vault data corresponding to this kind of list
field.validation-note: Showing options that match the type of list selected: {{type}}

value.empty: There are no lists corresponding to this kind of vault data
value.validation-note: Showing options that match the type of data selected: {{type}}

delete-toast.title: Rule is pending deletion
delete-toast.description: This will only take effect if you save your changes

affected.heading: {{count}} out of {{total}} total onboardings matched
affected.description: If these rules existed in the selected period they would've affected {{count}} onboardings
affected.none-total: This playbook did not have any onboardings during this time period. Please try a different date range

header.historical-tooltip: Rule outcomes based on existing rules at the time of these onboardings
header.backtested-tooltip: If the rules that are being tested existed at the time of these onboardings, rule outcomes may or may not have been different

historical.heading: Original rule outcomes
historical.description: Rule outcomes based on existing rules at the time of the onboardings above

backtested.heading: Backtested rule outcomes
backtested.description: If the rules that are being tested existed at the time of the onboardings above, the rule outcomes would've been these instead:

correlation.heading: Original rule outcomes to Backtested rule outcomes
correlation.description: Correlation between original and backtested rule outcomes
correlation.action-list: Rule outcomes that were originally <color>{{action}}</color> would:

kyb.title: Know Your Business (KYB)
kyb.ein-only: TIN (EIN) and business name verification only
kyb.none: Only collecting the data - no verification checks

kyc.none: KYC is not being conducted on beneficial owners

kyc.title: Know Your Customer (KYC)
kyc.full: Database checks with collected identity data are being performed
kyc.none: Database checks with collected identity data are not being performed

fraud-checks.title: Fraud checks
fraud-checks.sentilink: Synthetic fraud with SentiLink is enabled
fraud-checks.neuro: Behavioral fraud with Neuro-ID is enabled

collected-data.name: Full name
collected-data.ssn-doc-scan-step-up: Request ID Document scan if SSN skipped
collected-data.address-display: Address line, Zip code, City, State
